title: Moroccan Crispy Cookies
description: A sweet and crunchy cookie recipe with a moroccan twist, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut sugar, and moroccan spice.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Add crispy rice cereal and mix until combined.
Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
Remove from oven and let cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes.
Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
